decks.notes: The main idea of this deck is to use creatures with defender abilities to generate mana and create a large mana pool. This allows the player to play powerful spells and creatures, ultimately leading to a combo finish. The deck focuses on ramping up quickly, utilizing cards like Axebane Guardian and Overgrown Battlement to accelerate mana production. It also includes cards like Freed from the Real to untap creatures and create infinite mana combinations for a powerful finish. Lead the Stampede and Winding Way help to refill the hand and find key combo pieces.

The deck focuses on controlling the game through various spells and card interactions while also assembling the Urzatron lands to generate a large amount of mana. It utilizes cards like Mnemonic Wall and Mystical Teachings to maintain board presence and find key spells, while also using cards like Crop Rotation and Ghostly Flicker to capitalize on the Urzatron lands. The deck also includes some utility spells like Weather the Storm and Pulse of Murasa to gain life and card advantage. Overall, the deck aims to outvalue the opponent through resource management and powerful late-game plays.

The main idea of this deck is to play aggressively, utilizing cards that deal direct damage to the opponent while also maintaining a strong board presence with creatures. By playing low-cost and efficient spells like Lightning Bolt and Fiery Temper, the aim is to quickly reduce the opponent's life total to zero. The inclusion of cards like Guttersnipe and Voldaren Epicure further enhances the deck's burn ability, while also providing additional value. Highway Robbery and Grab the Prize offer card draw and potential ramp, helping to maintain card advantage throughout the game.

This Rakdos Aggro deck focuses on a fast and aggressive strategy, utilizing low-cost creatures like Kitchen Imp and Sneaky Snacker to quickly chip away at the opponent's life total. The deck also includes burn spells like Fiery Temper and Lightning Bolt to further pressure the opponent. Alms of the Vein and Vampire's Kiss provide additional reach and lifegain, while cards like Grab the Prize and Highway Robbery help maintain card advantage. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of creature-based aggression and direct damage spells.

The main concept of this deck is to control the board using a combination of counter spells, removal spells, and protection spells while utilizing Gate lands to fix mana and gain additional benefits. The deck focuses on card advantage through card draw and recursion with Squadron Hawk and Sacred Cat, while also having the ability to gain life and protect against combat damage with Prismatic Strands. The deck aims to stall the game until it can establish a strong board presence and overwhelm the opponent with efficient creatures and powerful enchantments.

The main focus of this deck is to establish control over the game by using a combination of card draw, removal spells, and counter magic. By efficiently managing resources and disrupting opponents' strategies, the Dimir Control deck aims to outlast opponents while building up its own board presence with powerful creatures like Gurmag Angler and Tolarian Terror. Utilizing a mixture of cheap removal spells, counterspells, and card draw effects, this deck is designed to consistently control the flow of the game and dictate the pace to secure victory.

The Dimir Control deck focuses on disrupting opponents with counterspells and removal while utilizing efficient creatures like Gurmag Angler and Murmuring Mystic to maintain board control. The deck also includes card draw and graveyard interaction to maintain tempo and outvalue opponents. The main strategy is to control the game through disruption and removal while slowly building up card advantage and threats to eventually overwhelm the opponent. The deck's mana base is designed to support its dual-color requirements while also maximizing consistency and utility.

The main focus of this UR Control deck is to maintain board control through a combination of countermagic, removal spells, and card advantage. Tolarian Terror and Murmuring Mystic provide threats while generating value. The deck also includes a mix of efficient burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Skred to deal with opposing creatures. Additionally, the deck utilizes cantrips like Brainstorm, Preordain, and Ponder to ensure consistent card draw and selection. Overall, the deck aims to outlast opponents by controlling the game and ultimately winning through incremental advantage.

The main focus of this Dimir Control deck is to maintain control of the game by countering spells, removing threats, and generating card advantage through card draw and token creation. The deck utilizes a mix of creatures with enter-the-battlefield abilities like Augur of Bolas and Faerie Seer, along with efficient removal spells like Snuff Out and Cast Down. The inclusion of Counterspell and Spell Pierce helps the deck maintain control on the stack, while Lórien Revealed provides additional card draw. The deck also includes a few win conditions like Murmuring Mystic and Thorn of the Black Rose to close out the game.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a swarm of Elf creatures, using mana dorks like Elvish Mystic and Fyndhorn Elves to accelerate your board development. Cards like Timberwatch Elf and Nyxborn Hydra provide big threats, while Priest of Titania generates a lot of mana. Lead the Stampede and Winding Way help refill your hand and maintain pressure. The overall goal is to quickly build a wide board and use pump effects to overpower the opponent before they can stabilize.

The key concept of this deck is to quickly amass artifacts on the battlefield, utilizing cards like Myr Enforcer and Refurbished Familiar, to power up the Affinity mechanic. This allows for explosive and aggressive plays, supported by cards such as Galvanic Blast and Reckoner's Bargain to finish off opponents quickly. The deck also includes disruption elements like Nihil Spellbomb and Krark-Clan Shaman to control the board and disrupt opponent strategies. With a focus on efficient artifact creatures and spells, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a fast and powerful aggro strategy.

The deck focuses on maximizing the benefits of artifacts by using them to generate efficient creatures and removal spells. By combining cheap artifact creatures like Myr Enforcer and Refurbished Familiar with spells like Galvanic Blast and Krark-Clan Shaman, the deck can quickly overwhelm opponents with aggressive attacks. Additionally, cards like Ichor Wellspring and Thoughtcast help maintain card advantage while also providing extra value from artifacts. The deck also includes a small sacrifice theme with cards like Nihil Spellbomb and Makeshift Munitions to further control the board and disrupt opponents' strategies.

This Gruul Aggro deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana with Arbor Elf, Utopia Sprawl, and Wild Growth to drop powerful creatures like Writhing Chrysalis, Annoyed Altisaur, and Avenging Hunter. The deck also includes removal spells like Mwonvuli Acid-Moss and Thermokarst to disrupt opponents' plans and keep the pressure on with aggressive creatures like Boarding Party and Eldrazi Repurposer. The deck aims to overwhelm opponents with high-powered threats while efficiently managing resources to secure victory in a fast-paced 1v1 Pauper matchup.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly deal damage to the opponent using aggressive creatures and burn spells. The synergy between creatures like Kessig Flamebreather and spells like Lightning Bolt and Fireblast allows for consistent damage output. Additionally, cards like Sneaky Snacker and Voldaren Epicure provide additional pressure on the opponent. Faithless Looting helps to filter through the deck, while Grab the Prize and Highway Robbery provide card advantage and help maintain momentum. Overall, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of creature and direct damage.

This Mono Blue Aggro deck focuses on quickly deploying low-cost creatures like Delver of Secrets and Tolarian Terror while using cheap and efficient spells like Brainstorm and Counterspell to disrupt the opponent's game plan. By utilizing cards like Mental Note and Thought Scour to fill the graveyard, it aims to reduce the cost of casting creatures like Cryptic Serpent and taking advantage of their powerful abilities. With the addition of card draw spells like Deep Analysis and control options like Spell Pierce, the deck aims to maintain tempo and pressure throughout the game.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly establish a board presence and deal direct damage to the opponent using aggressive Rakdos creatures and burn spells. By combining efficient creatures like Kitchen Imp and Voldaren Epicure with powerful burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Fiery Temper, this deck aims to pressure the opponent early and finish them off with direct damage spells. The inclusion of cards like Faithless Looting and Grab the Prize helps to maintain card advantage and ensure the deck can continue to apply pressure throughout the game.
